name: Stage 3: Link Existing Component
description: Link a registered model component to computational grids to create a component configuration (Stage 3 of 4)
title: [EMD] Stage 3: Link Existing Component: [do not edit]

field_guidance.model_component:
**Registered model component**

Choose the component from the list. It must already exist in the EMD registry.
If it is not listed here, submit a
[Stage 3: Model Component](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml)
issue first, then return to this form.
field_guidance.horizontal_computational_grid:
**Horizontal grid reference**

Select the h### ID registered in Stage 2a. Leave as 'Not specified' only
for components with no horizontal dimension (e.g. 1D column models).
field_guidance.vertical_computational_grid:
**Vertical grid reference**

Select the v### ID registered in Stage 2b. Leave as 'Not specified' only
for components with no vertical dimension (e.g. 2D surface models).
